message.content:
{
  "page_type": "fault_table",
  "summary": "This page is a Daikin VRV fault code guide. It visually categorizes fault codes into indoor unit, outdoor unit, and system faults, and provides detailed troubleshooting for code A3 (condensate water level abnormal).",
  "visual_entities": [
    {"type": "text_block", "label": "Title: 大金 VRV 根据故障代码（排除故障方法）"},
    {"type": "diagram", "label": "Fault code categorization diagram"},
    {"type": "text_block", "label": "Section: 1.1室内机常见故障"},
    {"type": "table", "label": "Troubleshooting table for fault code A3"},
    {"type": "text_block", "label": "Footer: DAIKIN SERVICE CENTER OF SHANGHAI"},
    {"type": "logo", "label": "DAIKIN logo"},
    {"type": "logo", "label": "coolling.net logo"}
  ],
  "visual_relationships": [
    {"from": "Fault code categorization diagram", "relation": "contains", "to": "室内机常见故障"},
    {"from": "室内机常见故障", "relation": "lists", "to": "A3, A5, A6, C4"},
    {"from": "Fault code categorization diagram", "relation": "contains", "to": "室外机常见故障"},
    {"from": "室外机常见故障", "relation": "lists", "to": "E3, E5, F3, L5"},
    {"from": "Fault code categorization diagram", "relation": "contains", "to": "系统常见故障"},
    {"from": "系统常见故障", "relation": "lists", "to": "U1, U2, U4, U7"},
    {"from": "Troubleshooting table for fault code A3", "relation": "details", "to": "A3"}
  ],
  "useful_for_knowledge_types": ["fault_diagnosis", "troubleshooting_procedures", "component_identification"],
  "ocr_text_if_useful": "大金 VRV 根据故障代码（排除故障方法）\n故障代码说明\n室内机常见故障\nA3 A5 A6 C4\n室外机常见故障\nE3 E5 F3 L5\n系统常见故障\nU1 U2 U4 U7\nDAIKIN SERVICE CENTER OF SHANGHAI\n1.1室内机常见故障\n故障代码：A3（冷凝水位异常）\n判断条件：非水位上升时，浮子开关处于关闭\n原因对策：\n排水配管堵塞 ——疏通管道（用户）\n排水管施工错误 ——改善安装（安装）\n排水泵不良 ——更换部品（维修）\n浮子开关不良 ——更换部品（维修）\n室内机电路板不良 ——更换部品（维修）\n短路连接端不良 ——设定确认（维修）\n注：没有提升泵时应将X15A短接\nDAIKIN SERVICE CENTER OF SHANGHAI",
  "uncertainty_notes": "The exact meaning of some Chinese terms (e.g., '短路连接端不良') may require domain-specific translation. The visual layout clearly shows categorization, but the full context of all fault codes is not detailed on this page.",
  "confidence": 0.95
}

parsed.summary: This page is a Daikin VRV fault code guide. It visually categorizes fault codes into indoor unit, outdoor unit, and system faults, and provides detailed troubleshooting for code A3 (condensate water level abnormal).

visual_entities.label: Title: 大金 VRV 根据故障代码（排除故障方法）
Troubleshooting table for fault code A3
Footer: DAIKIN SERVICE CENTER OF SHANGHAI

visual_relationships.from: Troubleshooting table for fault code A3

parsed.ocr_text_if_useful:
大金 VRV 根据故障代码（排除故障方法）
故障代码说明
室内机常见故障
A3 A5 A6 C4
室外机常见故障
E3 E5 F3 L5
系统常见故障
U1 U2 U4 U7
DAIKIN SERVICE CENTER OF SHANGHAI
1.1室内机常见故障
故障代码：A3（冷凝水位异常）
判断条件：非水位上升时，浮子开关处于关闭
原因对策：
排水配管堵塞 ——疏通管道（用户）
排水管施工错误 ——改善安装（安装）
排水泵不良 ——更换部品（维修）
浮子开关不良 ——更换部品（维修）
室内机电路板不良 ——更换部品（维修）
短路连接端不良 ——设定确认（维修）
注：没有提升泵时应将X15A短接
DAIKIN SERVICE CENTER OF SHANGHAI
parsed.uncertainty_notes: The exact meaning of some Chinese terms (e.g., '短路连接端不良') may require domain-specific translation. The visual layout clearly shows categorization, but the full context of all fault codes is not detailed on this page.
